title: aadr-subset selector
description: Declarative AADR panel-subset definition. Top-level keys AND-combine; `any:` provides one-level OR; `exclude:` provides one-level NOT-of-OR. Flat grammar — no nesting beyond one level. See cs-wiki/projects/aadr-subset.md for full semantics. Deprecated `master_ids:` / `master_ids_source:` aliases accepted in v0.1 with a load-time stderr warning; removed in v0.2.

populations.description: Match against group_id (Group ID per AADR conventions). v66 dropped suffix variants (.SG/.AG/.DG) — selectors targeting v62 vs v66 use different literal values.

individual_ids.description: Match against individual_id (Master ID in v44-v62; Individual ID in v66+). Sample-stable across versions modulo MID-rename bridge handled by aadr-resolve.

individual_ids_source.description: Path to newline-delimited Individual ID list. Relative paths resolve to the selector YAML's directory. BOM tolerated; blank lines and `#`-prefix comments ignored; LF and CRLF accepted; internal-whitespace IDs are an error.

source_version.description: AADR version the selector's individual_ids / individual_ids_source IDs are defined in. Required when resolve_to_version is set.

resolve_to_version.description: AADR version to materialize the cohort against. When set, the CLI requires --source-anno PATH for the source-version .anno file.

modern_only.description: Shorthand for date_calbp <= 70 (1880 CE; the AADR convention for present-day vs ancient). Samples with <NA> date FAIL this filter.

min_coverage.description: Minimum 1240k-target coverage threshold. NaN coverage FAILS this filter (modern array-genotyped samples appear as NaN). v62 inputs (class D) have no native coverage column — see coverage_column and --coverage-derive snps_hit_1240k.

coverage_column.description: Override the canonical coverage column source; forwards to AnnoFrame.coverage_via(NAME). Selector-side value wins over CLI --coverage-column. Included in selector_signature.

date.description: Date filter on date_calbp (canonical calBP integer years from Reich Lab's `Date mean in BP` column). Semantic constraint date.min_calbp <= date.max_calbp is enforced post-schema with exit 4.

any.description: OR-block. Array of branches; each branch is an AND-block. Branches may NOT contain nested `any:` or `exclude:` (flat grammar — see HLD § Selector grammar semantics).

exclude.description: NOT-of-OR block. A sample matching ANY condition is dropped. May NOT contain nested `exclude:` or `any:`.

master_ids.description: DEPRECATED alias for individual_ids. Removed in v0.2.

master_ids_source.description: DEPRECATED alias for individual_ids_source. Removed in v0.2.

allOf.description: Reject specifying both canonical and deprecated aliases for the same concept.
resolve_to_version requires source_version (so the engine knows what version to bridge from).
source_version is meaningful only with cross-version resolution.

aadr_version.description: AADR public-release identifier. Bench-verified set as of 2026-05; new releases extend this enum.

min_calbp.description: Inclusive lower bound on date_calbp (years before 1950 CE).

branch.description: An `any:` branch is a flat AND-block. Allowed keys are the same as top-level filter keys EXCEPT `any:`, `exclude:`, `source_version:`, and `resolve_to_version:` (those are top-level-only).
